diagrams.title: CP15 Register Access Instruction Format
diagrams.description: Shows MRC/MCR instruction format for CP15 register access
elements: Example: MRC p15, 0, R0, c1, c0, 0 reads SCTLR
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to access and configure CP15 registers for MMU and cache control

diagrams.title: Cache Memory Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Pyramid structure showing CPU at top with fastest/smallest memory, main memory at bottom
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the trade-off between speed and size in memory hierarchy

diagrams.title: Virtual Address Translation Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing how virtual address is translated to physical address using TLB and page tables
elements: TLB Miss → Page Table Walk in Memory
Load translation to TLB → Return Physical Address
diagrams.purpose: Understanding MMU address translation process and TLB role in performance

diagrams.title: Cache Write Policies Comparison
diagrams.description: Two flowcharts comparing Write-Through and Write-Back policies
elements: Write-Through: CPU → Cache → Write to Memory → Continue
On Eviction: Write dirty data to Memory → Load new data
diagrams.purpose: Understanding difference between cache write policies and their implications
